courseName: Generative AI 2026: Build AI Apps and Agents

publish.tagline: Build and launch a sellable AI app with agents that can be monetized with Stripe, deployed in the cloud, well documented, and ready to use.
publish.publicDescription: A 30-day execution course for digital nomads who already use AI daily and want to ship a real commercial product. You will define a clear promise, scope an MVP, build reliable AI features, deploy on Vercel, add Stripe payments, and launch with a feedback driven iteration plan.
whoItsFor: Digital nomads building a first commercial AI app
Solo builders and indie founders who need a repeatable process
Creators who want to monetize a practical AI workflow
prerequisites: Comfort with basic web development concepts
A GitHub account and basic git usage
Ability to spend 15 to 30 minutes per day for 30 days
whatYouShip: Working AI feature with safe prompts and guardrails
Staging and production deployment on Vercel
Stripe checkout and webhook based access control
Launch checklist and 30 day iteration roadmap
publish.useAndShareNote: You may share outputs publicly, but remove confidential customer data and API keys. Replace examples with anonymized data.
publish.licenseNote: Unless you attach a separate license, treat this course content as proprietary to the publisher.

intent.oneSentence: Teach digital nomads to build and launch a sellable AI app with agents, payments, and a clear path to iteration.
outcomes: Define a narrow problem, user, and product promise that can be tested quickly.
Build a reliable AI feature with prompts, tools, and guardrails.
Deploy the product to the cloud and connect payments with Stripe.
Launch with a checklist and maintain a feedback driven iteration plan.
nonGoals: Deep model training or ML research
Complex infrastructure or multi cloud architecture

concepts: agent workflow design and tool calling
procedures: Define problem, user, and promise, then scope MVP
Build and test AI features with prompts, tools, and guardrails
Deploy, monetize, and iterate using feedback and metrics

midCourse.deliverable: MVP scope, agent workflow, and cost guard checklist
midCourse.evaluation: Scope clarity, workflow testability, and cost limits

final.deliverable: Commercial AI app launch kit and 30 day iteration roadmap
final.evaluation: Launch readiness, payment flow, and iteration plan quality
